_meta.description: Deerflow Framework — MCP Tools Registry. Describes all available tools, their parameters, and usage rules.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a file from the workspace. Supports text files up to 5MB. Returns file content with line numbers.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file within the workspace.

offset.description: Line number to start reading from (1-based).

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to read.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file. Creates the file if it does not exist. Overwrites if it does exist (confirmation required for existing files).

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the target file.

content.description: The content to write to the file.

createDirectories.description: Create parent directories if they don't exist.

usage.confirmationMessage: You are about to write to {path}. Existing content will be overwritten. Proceed?

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List files and directories at a given path. Supports recursive listing and glob-based filtering.

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search the codebase using regex patterns. Powered by ripgrep for fast, accurate results. Returns matching lines with context.

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern to search for.

path.description: Directory or file to search in. Defaults to workspace root.

contextLines.description: Number of context lines before and after matches.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of matches to return.

tools.name: git_diff
tools.description: Show differences between git refs, commits, or the working tree. Supports staged and unstaged changes.

target.description: Git ref or commit range (e.g., 'HEAD~1', 'main..feature'). Omit for working tree diff.

file.description: Restrict diff to a specific file or directory.

stat.description: Show summary statistics instead of full diff.

tools.name: git_log
tools.description: Show commit history with configurable format and filtering. Supports conventional commit parsing.

limit.description: Maximum number of commits to return.

author.description: Filter by author name or email.

since.description: Only show commits after this date (ISO 8601).

file.description: Only show commits that modified this file.

grep.description: Search commit messages for this pattern.

tools.name: git_blame
tools.description: Show who last modified each line of a file, with commit hash, author, and date.

file.description: Path to the file to blame.

tools.name: run_tests
tools.description: Execute test suites and return results with coverage information. Auto-detects Jest or Vitest configuration.

pattern.description: Glob pattern to select specific test files (e.g., 'src/auth/**/*.test.ts').

tools.name: run_validation
tools.description: Run the full Deerflow quality gate suite: TypeScript check, ESLint, Prettier, and custom checks as configured in deerflow.config.yaml.

checks.description: Specific checks to run. Omit for all checks.

fix.description: Attempt to auto-fix issues where possible.

generateReport.description: Write a detailed report to deerflow/reports/.

usage.note: Only modifies files if 'fix' is set to true.

tools.name: security_audit
tools.description: Run security audits: dependency vulnerability scan and hardcoded secret detection across the codebase.

auditors.description: Specific auditors to run. Omit for all.

failOnVulnerabilities.description: Return error status if vulnerabilities found.

tools.name: generate_docs
tools.description: Generate documentation from code. Supports API reference generation, README updates, and changelog creation.

usage.confirmationMessage: Documentation generation will create/modify files in {outputDir}. Proceed?

tools.name: analyze_bundle
tools.description: Analyze the build bundle for size, composition, and potential optimizations. Generates a treemap visualization.

compareBaseline.description: Compare against previous baseline for regression detection.

outputFormat.description: Output format for the analysis report.

tools.name: update_context
tools.description: Update the Deerflow context file (deerflow/context.md) with current task information, progress, and notes.

section.description: Section of the context file to update.

content.description: Markdown content to write to the section.

append.description: Append to the section instead of replacing.

usage.note: This is the only tool allowed to modify deerflow/context.md without confirmation.
